scripts.dev: echo "TrialForge Dev Commands:" && echo "  npm run dev:site-network:frontend  — Start SNA frontend" && echo "  npm run dev:site-network:backend   — Start SNA backend" && echo "  npm run test:site-network           — Run all SNA tests" && echo "  npm run e2e:site-network            — Run SNA Playwright e2e"
scripts.dev:site-network:frontend: cd modules/site-network/frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:site-network:backend: cd modules/site-network/backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.test:site-network: cd modules/site-network && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.dev:identity:backend: cd modules/identity/backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:patient-registry:backend: cd modules/patient-registry/backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:visit-scheduling:backend: cd modules/visit-scheduling/backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:form-builder:backend: cd modules/form-builder/backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:edc:backend: cd modules/edc/backend && npm install && npm run dev
